name: shos.nbodyproblemsimulator
description: Browser-only 3D N-body problem simulator with local Three.js textured rendering.

scripts.vendor:three:verify: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['Sources/vendor/three.module.min.js','Sources/vendor/three.core.min.js'];const missing=files.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file));if(missing.length){console.error('Missing vendor files:', missing.join(', '));process.exit(1);}console.log('three vendor bundles verified');"
scripts.three:update: npm install three@latest && npm run vendor:three && npm run vendor:three:verify && npm test

author: Fujio Kojima
